name: EBV_EBNA1_gly_ala_repeat
description: EBNA1 glycine-alanine repeat (GAr): low-complexity (Gly-Ala)n region within EBNA1 (~239 amino acids of repeat in the B95-8 strain, encoded by ~720 bp of (GGN-GCN)n DNA). The GAr inhibits proteasomal degradation of EBNA1 and blocks its presentation on MHC-I, contributing to immune evasion. Highly repetitive coding sequence — short reads pile up across the repeat and require copy-number-aware assembly to determine repeat length; length is polymorphic between strains.
expected_copy_count: ~239 amino acid (Gly-Ala) units in B95-8; varies per strain
